description: IdiotProof Alert Configuration - Get notified when stocks are moving

discord.instructions: Create webhook: Server Settings > Integrations > Webhooks > New Webhook

email.instructions: For Gmail: Enable 2FA, create App Password at myaccount.google.com/apppasswords

sms.instructions: Sign up at twilio.com, get a phone number (~$1/month + $0.01/SMS)

telegram.instructions: Create bot: Talk to @BotFather, get chat ID: Talk to @userinfobot
